title: brickellia longifolia var. multiflora
intro: Brickellia longifolia var. multiflora, also known as Mexican Brickellia, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brickellia longifolia var. multiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
